nodes.name: ⑧ Code: Parse SEO Brief JSON

parameters.text:
=This blog post scored {{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.seoScore }}/100 on SEO quality check. It needs improvement.

Specific issues to fix:
- Word count: {{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.wordCount }} words — target is 1,400+
- H2 sections found: {{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.h2Count }} — target is 6 or more
- Internal links embedded: {{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.internalLinks }} — target is 2-5
- Primary keyword "{{ $('⑥ Code: Parse Topic JSON').first().json.primaryKeyword }}" used {{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.primaryKwCount }} times — target is 4-8
- Keyword density: {{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.keywordDensity }}% — target is 0.5-2.0%

Available internal links to embed naturally:
{{ $('③ Code: Set Pipeline Variables').first().json.internalPagesJson }}

Original content:
{{ $('⑪ Code: SEO Quality Check').first().json.contentMarkdown }}

Rewrite rules:
1. Fix ONLY the SEO issues identified — preserve the human voice, Australian English, tone, and all factual content
2. Add H2 sections by splitting long sections or adding a relevant new angle — never add padding
3. Expand word count only where content genuinely adds value
4. Embed internal links naturally using the anchor text from the list above
5. Use the primary keyword more but only where it reads naturally

Return ONLY the improved markdown — no H1 title, no frontmatter, no JSON wrapper.
